assumptions: No prior Customer.io account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: A Customer.io campaign sends its message to the test person and the email arrives in the test inbox.

first_success.outcome: A Customer.io campaign sends its message to the test person and the email arrives in the test inbox.
first_success.observable_signal: The test inbox receives the campaign email.

route_selection.surface: Quick start guide: workspace, email channel, test person, first campaign email
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Quick start guide: workspace, email channel, test person, first campaign email

candidates.name: Quick start guide: workspace, email channel, test person, first campaign email
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Customer.io and create or select a workspace.
Configure the workspace email channel using the quick-start path.
required_path.observable_result: The email channel is available for campaign messages.

required_path.action: Add a test person using an email address you can inspect.
required_path.observable_result: The test person appears in the workspace.

required_path.action: Create the quick-start campaign and compose its email message.
required_path.observable_result: The campaign is ready to send to the test person.

required_path.action: Trigger or start the campaign for the test person.
required_path.observable_result: Customer.io records the email as sent.

required_path.action: Open the test inbox and confirm receipt of the campaign message.
required_path.observable_result: The first campaign email is visible in the inbox.

prerequisites.description: An email sending channel configured as required by the quick start.
An inbox address that can be used for the test person.

external_gates.description: Email sending configuration must be usable before the campaign can deliver.
Inbox filtering or delivery latency can delay the observable email receipt.

platform_outcomes.description: A Customer.io campaign sends its message to the test person and the email arrives in the test inbox.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Send your first campaign email
evidence_supported: A Customer.io campaign sends its message to the test person and the email arrives in the test inbox.
The test inbox receives the campaign email.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Send your first campaign email path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
